Translation.Description: Also know as the Toxic Jabber, this spear will spread deadly toxins through the victim's blood system in record time, making it unsuitable for hunting (unless you're the type to enjoy your meat with a venomous tang). In other words, a killer's item.
Translation.Provides: Melee attacks also do 2 Poison damage per round to the victim
Impale- Strike an opponent and whoever is behind them
